message:
test: add JSONL artifact logging + secret redaction to agent loop VCR

Expand agent_loop_openai_vcr_basic with JSONL artifact output:

- write_jsonl_artifacts() helper: writes test logs (raw + normalized),
  artifact index (raw + normalized), and performs secret redaction
  validation against a forbidden token list
- Generates 4 JSONL artifact files per test run for downstream
  conformance analysis and audit trail
- Validates that no forbidden strings (API keys, VCR tokens) appear
  in the normalized output

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
